'''Limm''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] who served in the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], Limm and another GAG [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]], [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Wirut]] of the [[967 Commando]], [[Prisoner/Legends|arrested]] [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Cal Omas]] for [[Treason/Legends|treason]] by order of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]. After placing Omas under [[Prison/Legends|house arrest]], their [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Solo-Niathal coup|took control]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] with the help of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Cha Niathal]].<ref name="Sacrifice" />
